title: StackOps installer_data.json
description: Schema for StackOps installer package definitions.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor validation.

InstallerCategory.description: One category label allowed in InstallerData.categoryLabels.

oneOf.title: System Setup & Package Management
oneOf.description: Bootstrap installers, package managers, updaters, system prerequisites, and platform setup helpers.

oneOf.title: Languages & Runtimes
oneOf.description: Programming language runtimes, toolchains, language servers, kernels, and runtime managers.

oneOf.title: Editors & IDEs
oneOf.description: Graphical and terminal editors, coding IDEs, and editor-oriented installation helpers.

oneOf.title: Version Control
oneOf.description: Git, GitHub, worktree, repository inspection, and Git terminal UI tooling.

oneOf.title: Build, DevOps & Containers
oneOf.description: Build helpers, development containers, container tooling, service orchestration, and infrastructure utilities.

oneOf.title: AI Agents & Assistants
oneOf.description: AI coding agents, chat CLIs, agent launchers, MCP tooling, and assistant-oriented apps.

oneOf.title: Terminals & Shells
oneOf.description: Terminal emulators, shells, prompt engines, shell history tools, fonts, and terminal UX helpers.

oneOf.title: Terminal Workspaces & Multiplexers
oneOf.description: Terminal multiplexers, workspace managers, web terminals, shared terminal sessions, and process panes.

oneOf.title: Search & Navigation
oneOf.description: File, code, document, shell-history, semantic, and fuzzy-search tools.

oneOf.title: File Managers & Directory Browsers
oneOf.description: Terminal and web file managers, directory browsers, ls replacements, and remote file browsing tools.

oneOf.title: File Operations & Archives
oneOf.description: Archiving, copying, removal, file identification, previewing, cleanup, and clipboard utilities.

oneOf.title: Storage, Backup & Sync
oneOf.description: Disk usage analyzers, cloud sync, backup tools, filesystem integrations, and continuous synchronization.

oneOf.title: Data & Format Tools
oneOf.description: Structured data viewers, processors, converters, and command-line table or markup utilities.

oneOf.title: Databases & SQL Clients
oneOf.description: Database engines, database CLIs, SQL clients, database browsers, and TUI database visualizers.

oneOf.title: Networking & Diagnostics
oneOf.description: Network monitors, scanners, diagnostics, VPN clients, firewalls, IP lookup, and traffic inspection tools.

oneOf.title: Tunnels & Remote Access
oneOf.description: Localhost tunnels, reverse proxies, remote desktop tools, remote shells, and browser-based terminal access.

oneOf.title: File Transfer & Sharing
oneOf.description: Direct file transfer, encrypted sharing, local file servers, QR-based transfer, torrents, and shareable folders.

oneOf.title: Cloud & SaaS CLIs
oneOf.description: Cloud provider, SaaS administration, cloud storage, and Cloudflare tools.

oneOf.title: Browsers & Web Access
oneOf.description: Desktop browsers, terminal browsers, browser helpers, browser automation, and web access utilities.

oneOf.title: Web Scraping & Content Conversion
oneOf.description: Website crawling, scraping, document extraction, HTML conversion, and web-to-text workflows.

oneOf.title: Documents, Markdown & LaTeX
oneOf.description: Markdown renderers, document converters, PDF helpers, LaTeX distributions, editors, and presentation-from-text tools.

oneOf.title: Graphics, Images, OCR & Diagrams
oneOf.description: Image manipulation, terminal graphics, OCR, PDF/SVG rendering, diagrams, and graph visualization.

oneOf.title: Media, Audio & Video
oneOf.description: Music players, media downloaders, video tools, streaming apps, recording apps, and conferencing clients.

oneOf.title: Presentations & Recording
oneOf.description: Presentation tools, screen annotation, terminal recording, streaming helpers, and diagramming for talks.

oneOf.title: Productivity & Knowledge
oneOf.description: Notes, cheatsheets, text expansion, timers, prompt helpers, and productivity-oriented CLI utilities.

oneOf.title: Security, Credentials & Privacy
oneOf.description: Password managers, encryption, one-time secrets, VPN clients, firewall helpers, and privacy-oriented tools.

oneOf.title: Monitoring, Performance & System Info
oneOf.description: System monitors, process viewers, resource profilers, benchmarking tools, log analyzers, and system info displays.

oneOf.title: QR, Mobile & Device Tools
oneOf.description: QR code utilities, Android mirroring, mobile transfer helpers, Wi-Fi sharing, and multi-device control.

oneOf.title: Terminal Fun & Visuals
oneOf.description: ASCII art, terminal color effects, decorative terminal output, terminal graphics, and visual demos.

oneOf.title: Email & Communications
oneOf.description: Email clients, video conferencing, and communication-focused desktop or terminal tools.

oneOf.title: Finance & Markets
oneOf.description: Market, crypto, and prediction-market tools.

oneOf.title: Windows Platform Tools
oneOf.description: Windows-specific package managers, PowerShell tools, Visual Studio prerequisites, filesystem helpers, X11, and Windows desktop utilities.

appName.description: Name of the application. Must be unique within installers.

license.description: License identifier, license name, or project-specific license note.

repoURL.description: GitHub repository URL, direct installer source marker, or CMD for command-based installers.

fileNamePattern.description: Installer filename patterns, direct URLs, command strings, or local script references by architecture and OS.

InstallerPatternValue.description: Filename pattern, direct URL, command, local script name, package-manager command, or null when unsupported.

InstallerCategoryLabels.description: Category labels for this installer. Values must be drawn from definitions.InstallerCategory.
